name: Xuper TV: risks, legality and safe alternatives
snippet: Xuper TV is an unofficial IPTV app that is installed via APK and is not available in official stores. Risks: malware, abusive permissions, loss of privacy, and possible remote control of the device. In Spain and the EU, redistributing unlicensed content is illegal and can lead to blocking.
